issues.description: Uses SQLAlchemy 1.x style declarative_base() instead of SQLAlchemy 2.0 DeclarativeBase class pattern
issues.webResearchNote: SQLAlchemy 2.0 recommends using DeclarativeBase class pattern with Mapped[] and mapped_column() for better type hints and modern API

issues.description: Uses sync SQLite URL instead of async URL pattern used in other lessons
issues.webResearchNote: For consistency with async SQLAlchemy 2.0 lessons, should use sqlite+aiosqlite:///./dev.db

issues.description: Uses deprecated datetime.utcnow() which is deprecated in Python 3.12
issues.webResearchNote: Python 3.12 deprecated datetime.utcnow(); should use datetime.now(timezone.utc) per PEP 696

issues.description: Uses deprecated FastAPI on_event startup pattern
issues.webResearchNote: FastAPI recommends using lifespan context managers instead of on_event decorators in newer versions

issues.description: Uses Pydantic V1 Config class pattern instead of V2 model_config
issues.webResearchNote: Pydantic V2 uses model_config = ConfigDict(from_attributes=True) instead of nested Config class

issues.originalText:
from sqlalchemy.orm import declarative_base
Base = declarative_base()
issues.description: Uses SQLAlchemy 1.x style declarative_base() instead of SQLAlchemy 2.0 DeclarativeBase
issues.webResearchNote: SQLAlchemy 2.0 recommends DeclarativeBase class pattern for consistency with other lessons

issues.originalText:
from sqlalchemy.orm import declarative_base
Base = declarative_base()
issues.description: Uses SQLAlchemy 1.x style declarative_base() instead of SQLAlchemy 2.0 DeclarativeBase
issues.webResearchNote: SQLAlchemy 2.0 recommends DeclarativeBase class pattern for consistency

issues.description: Uses dict instead of SettingsConfigDict for Pydantic V2
issues.webResearchNote: Pydantic V2 recommends using SettingsConfigDict(env_file=".env") for better type safety
